title: Story Stones
description: Choose any three magical stones and discover one of 220 complete stories in its own illustrated setting.
learningGoals: Invent a beginning, encounter, and ending from visual prompts
Connect three characters or objects in a complete narrative arc
Retell and extend a short animated story aloud
interactionModel: tap or drag three unique stones into an unordered tray, play their complete story, then edit the group or choose another story
feedbackModel: Every combination is valid and unique; each has three recorded narration beats, expressive pose cues, and its own setting.
credits: QLOBE Kids contributors; original Krea 2 and GPT Image 2 art plus locally generated teacher narration (see ASSETS.md).
